mapper.select:
SELECT tbiar.INVM_EXNT_RQST_ID , tbiar.INVM_CMP_ID , tbiar.RQST_ENPR_ID , eim_vc.ETNM AS INVM_CMP_BPLC_NM , eim_com.ETNM AS RQST_BPLC_NM , eim_com.BZN AS BZN , tbiar.RGSN_TS AS INVM_STTG_DT , tbiar.BRCD , tbiar.EMN , tbiar.EMM , tbiar.EXNT_RSLT_CD , tbiar.INVM_PRFR_SCDL_AMT , tbiar. EXNT_MSG_CON , tbiar.EXNT_RSLT_RMRK
, rqsts.EXNT_RSLT_CD , rqsts.EXNT_RSLT_CD_NM
, tbiar.PRPL_MSG_CON , tbiar.RQST_MSG_CON
, tbias_end.INVM_EXNT_PGSG_CD , tbias_end.INVM_EXNT_PGSG_NM
, tbias_start.INVM_EXNT_PGSG_CD AS START_INVM_EXNT_PGSG_CD
, vcl_vc.INVM_CMP_PTRN_CD , ccd_vc.COM_CD_NM AS INVM_CMP_PTRN_NM , eid_com.ENPR_DSNC_CLSF_CD , ccd_com.COM_CD_NM AS ENPR_DSNC_CLSF_NM
, hope.INVM_HOPE_STG_NM , hope.INVM_HOPE_AMT_NM
, tbiar.AMNN_TS FROM TB_BOX_IVT_EXNT_RQST_M tbiar LEFT JOIN TB_BOX_IVT_ENPR_INFO_D eid_com ON eid_com.UTLINSTT_ID = tbiar.RQST_ENPR_ID LEFT JOIN TB_BOX_IVT_COM_CD_D ccd_com ON eid_com.ENPR_DSNC_CLSF_CD = ccd_com.COM_CD_ID LEFT JOIN ( SELECT A.INVM_EXNT_RQST_ID , A.INVM_EXNT_PGSG_CD , A.RGSN_TS , C.COM_CD_NM AS INVM_EXNT_PGSG_NM FROM TB_BOX_IVT_EXNT_PGSG_R A INNER JOIN ( SELECT INVM_EXNT_RQST_ID , MAX(RGSN_TS) AS END_TS FROM TB_BOX_IVT_EXNT_PGSG_R GROUP BY INVM_EXNT_RQST_ID ) B ON A.INVM_EXNT_RQST_ID = B.INVM_EXNT_RQST_ID AND A.RGSN_TS = B.END_TS LEFT JOIN TB_BOX_IVT_COM_CD_D C ON A.INVM_EXNT_PGSG_CD = C.COM_CD_ID ) tbias_end ON tbias_end.INVM_EXNT_RQST_ID = tbiar.INVM_EXNT_RQST_ID
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT A.INVM_EXNT_RQST_ID , A.INVM_EXNT_PGSG_CD , A.RGSN_TS FROM TB_BOX_IVT_EXNT_PGSG_R A INNER JOIN ( SELECT INVM_EXNT_RQST_ID , MIN(RGSN_TS) AS START_TS FROM TB_BOX_IVT_EXNT_PGSG_R GROUP BY INVM_EXNT_RQST_ID ) B ON A.INVM_EXNT_RQST_ID = B.INVM_EXNT_RQST_ID AND A.RGSN_TS = B.START_TS
) tbias_start ON tbias_start.INVM_EXNT_RQST_ID = tbiar.INVM_EXNT_RQST_ID
LEFT JOIN TB_BOX_IVT_ENPR_INFO_M eim_vc ON eim_vc.UTLINSTT_ID = tbiar.INVM_CMP_ID LEFT JOIN TB_BOX_IVT_ENPR_INFO_M eim_com ON eim_com.UTLINSTT_ID = tbiar.RQST_ENPR_ID
LEFT JOIN TB_BOX_IVT_VNCM_CPTL_L vcl_vc ON tbiar.INVM_CMP_ID = vcl_vc.UTLINSTT_ID LEFT JOIN TB_BOX_IVT_COM_CD_D ccd_vc ON vcl_vc.INVM_CMP_PTRN_CD = ccd_vc.COM_CD_ID LEFT JOIN ( SELECT hoped.UTLINSTT_ID , hoped.INVM_STG_CD , hoped.RGSN_TS , C.COM_CD_NM AS INVM_HOPE_STG_NM , CC.COM_CD_NM AS INVM_HOPE_AMT_NM FROM TB_BOX_IVT_INVM_HOPE_D hoped INNER JOIN ( SELECT UTLINSTT_ID , MAX(RGSN_TS) AS END_TS FROM TB_BOX_IVT_INVM_HOPE_D GROUP BY UTLINSTT_ID ) B ON hoped.UTLINSTT_ID = B.UTLINSTT_ID AND hoped.RGSN_TS = B.END_TS LEFT JOIN TB_BOX_IVT_COM_CD_D C ON hoped.INVM_STG_CD = C.COM_CD_ID LEFT JOIN TB_BOX_IVT_COM_CD_D CC ON hoped.INVM_AMT_CD = CC.COM_CD_ID ) hope ON hope.UTLINSTT_ID = tbiar.RQST_ENPR_ID LEFT JOIN ( SELECT rqst.INVM_EXNT_RQST_ID , rqst.RQST_ENPR_ID , rqst.EXNT_RSLT_CD , rqst.RGSN_TS , C.COM_CD_NM AS EXNT_RSLT_CD_NM FROM TB_BOX_IVT_EXNT_RQST_M rqst INNER JOIN ( SELECT INVM_EXNT_RQST_ID , MAX(RGSN_TS) AS END_TS FROM TB_BOX_IVT_EXNT_RQST_M GROUP BY INVM_EXNT_RQST_ID ) B ON rqst.INVM_EXNT_RQST_ID = B.INVM_EXNT_RQST_ID AND rqst.RGSN_TS = B.END_TS LEFT JOIN TB_BOX_IVT_COM_CD_D C ON rqst.EXNT_RSLT_CD = C.COM_CD_ID ) rqsts ON rqsts.INVM_EXNT_RQST_ID = tbiar.INVM_EXNT_RQST_ID WHERE 1=1 AND tbias_end.INVM_EXNT_PGSG_CD IN('EXN00000', 'EXN00001' , 'EXN00002' , 'EXN00003', 'EXN01000', 'EXN01001', 'EXN01002')
AND tbias_start.INVM_EXNT_PGSG_CD = #{listStartType}
AND tbiar.EXNT_RSLT_CD = #{searchResStatus}
AND tbias_end.INVM_EXNT_PGSG_CD = #{searchStatus}
AND UPPER(eim_com.ETNM) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{searchComNm}) || '%'
AND UPPER(eim_com.BZN) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{searchBzn}) || '%'
AND TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(tbiar.RGSN_TS, 'YYYYMMDD'), 'YYYYMMDD') BETWEEN TO_DATE(#{searchFromDate}, 'YYYYMMDD') AND TO_DATE(#{searchToDate}, 'YYYYMMDD')
ORDER BY
tbiar.RGSN_TS DESC
eim_com.ETNM ASC
eim_com.BZN ASC
tbiar.EXNT_RSLT_CD ASC

SELECT tbiar.INVM_EXNT_RQST_ID , tbiar.INVM_CMP_ID , tbiar.RQST_ENPR_ID , eim_vc.ETNM AS INVM_CMP_BPLC_NM , eim_com.ETNM AS RQST_BPLC_NM , eim_com.BZN AS BZN , tbiar.RGSN_TS AS INVM_STTG_DT , tbiar.BRCD , tbiar.EMN , tbiar.EMM , tbiar.EXNT_RSLT_CD
, tbiar.PRPL_MSG_CON , tbiar.RQST_MSG_CON
, tbias_end.INVM_EXNT_PGSG_CD , tbias_end.INVM_EXNT_PGSG_NM
, tbias_start.INVM_EXNT_PGSG_CD AS START_INVM_EXNT_PGSG_CD
, vcl_vc.INVM_CMP_PTRN_CD , ccd_vc.COM_CD_NM AS INVM_CMP_PTRN_NM , eid_com.ENPR_DSNC_CLSF_CD , ccd_com.COM_CD_NM AS ENPR_DSNC_CLSF_NM
, hope.INVM_HOPE_STG_NM , hope.INVM_HOPE_AMT_NM FROM TB_BOX_IVT_EXNT_RQST_M tbiar LEFT JOIN TB_BOX_IVT_ENPR_INFO_D eid_com ON eid_com.UTLINSTT_ID = tbiar.RQST_ENPR_ID LEFT JOIN TB_BOX_IVT_COM_CD_D ccd_com ON eid_com.ENPR_DSNC_CLSF_CD = ccd_com.COM_CD_ID LEFT JOIN ( SELECT A.INVM_EXNT_RQST_ID , A.INVM_EXNT_PGSG_CD , A.RGSN_TS , C.COM_CD_NM AS INVM_EXNT_PGSG_NM FROM TB_BOX_IVT_EXNT_PGSG_R A INNER JOIN ( SELECT INVM_EXNT_RQST_ID , MAX(RGSN_TS) AS END_TS FROM TB_BOX_IVT_EXNT_PGSG_R GROUP BY INVM_EXNT_RQST_ID ) B ON A.INVM_EXNT_RQST_ID = B.INVM_EXNT_RQST_ID AND A.RGSN_TS = B.END_TS LEFT JOIN TB_BOX_IVT_COM_CD_D C ON A.INVM_EXNT_PGSG_CD = C.COM_CD_ID ) tbias_end ON tbias_end.INVM_EXNT_RQST_ID = tbiar.INVM_EXNT_RQST_ID
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT A.INVM_EXNT_RQST_ID , A.INVM_EXNT_PGSG_CD , A.RGSN_TS FROM TB_BOX_IVT_EXNT_PGSG_R A INNER JOIN ( SELECT INVM_EXNT_RQST_ID , MIN(RGSN_TS) AS START_TS FROM TB_BOX_IVT_EXNT_PGSG_R GROUP BY INVM_EXNT_RQST_ID ) B ON A.INVM_EXNT_RQST_ID = B.INVM_EXNT_RQST_ID AND A.RGSN_TS = B.START_TS
) tbias_start ON tbias_start.INVM_EXNT_RQST_ID = tbiar.INVM_EXNT_RQST_ID
LEFT JOIN TB_BOX_IVT_ENPR_INFO_M eim_vc ON eim_vc.UTLINSTT_ID = tbiar.INVM_CMP_ID LEFT JOIN TB_BOX_IVT_ENPR_INFO_M eim_com ON eim_com.UTLINSTT_ID = tbiar.RQST_ENPR_ID
LEFT JOIN TB_BOX_IVT_VNCM_CPTL_L vcl_vc ON tbiar.INVM_CMP_ID = vcl_vc.UTLINSTT_ID LEFT JOIN TB_BOX_IVT_COM_CD_D ccd_vc ON vcl_vc.INVM_CMP_PTRN_CD = ccd_vc.COM_CD_ID LEFT JOIN ( SELECT hoped.UTLINSTT_ID , hoped.INVM_STG_CD , hoped.RGSN_TS , C.COM_CD_NM AS INVM_HOPE_STG_NM , CC.COM_CD_NM AS INVM_HOPE_AMT_NM FROM TB_BOX_IVT_INVM_HOPE_D hoped INNER JOIN ( SELECT UTLINSTT_ID , MAX(RGSN_TS) AS END_TS FROM TB_BOX_IVT_INVM_HOPE_D GROUP BY UTLINSTT_ID ) B ON hoped.UTLINSTT_ID = B.UTLINSTT_ID AND hoped.RGSN_TS = B.END_TS LEFT JOIN TB_BOX_IVT_COM_CD_D C ON hoped.INVM_STG_CD = C.COM_CD_ID LEFT JOIN TB_BOX_IVT_COM_CD_D CC ON hoped.INVM_AMT_CD = CC.COM_CD_ID ) hope ON hope.UTLINSTT_ID = tbiar.RQST_ENPR_ID WHERE 1=1 AND tbias_end.INVM_EXNT_PGSG_CD IN('EXN00000', 'EXN00001' , 'EXN00002' , 'EXN00003', 'EXN01000', 'EXN01001', 'EXN01002')
AND tbias_start.INVM_EXNT_PGSG_CD = #{listStartType}
AND tbiar.EXNT_RSLT_CD = #{searchResStatus}
AND tbias_end.INVM_EXNT_PGSG_CD = #{searchStatus}
AND UPPER(eim_com.ETNM) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{searchComNm}) || '%'
AND UPPER(eim_com.BZN) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{searchBzn}) || '%'
AND TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(tbiar.RGSN_TS, 'YYYYMMDD'), 'YYYYMMDD') BETWEEN TO_DATE(#{searchFromDate}, 'YYYYMMDD') AND TO_DATE(#{searchToDate}, 'YYYYMMDD')
ORDER BY
tbiar.RGSN_TS DESC
eim_com.ETNM ASC
eim_com.BZN ASC
tbias_end.INVM_EXNT_PGSG_CD DESC

SELECT irbsin.UTLINSTT_ID , irbsin.BNNM , irbsin.RGSN_TS , irbsin.RGSN_USER_ID , irbsin.ADR , irbsin.BZN , irbsin.HMPG_URL_ADR , irbsin.EMP_CNT , irbsin.TTIS_STCNT , irbsin.CPFN_AMT , irbsin.CNPL , enprInfo.ENPR_INRD_CON , hope.INVM_HOPE_STG_NM , hope.INVM_HOPE_AMT_NM , rqst.BRCD , rqst.EMN , rqst.EMM , rqst.INVM_EXNT_RQST_ID , rqst.EXNT_RSLT_CD , rqst.AMNN_TS , rqst.ADDT_DOC_FILE_ID , rqst.ANNC_DAT_FILE_ID , rqst.EXNT_MSG_CON , rqst.EXNT_RSLT_RMRK , rqst.INVM_PRFR_SCDL_AMT , tbias_end.INVM_EXNT_PGSG_CD , tbias_end.INVM_EXNT_PGSG_NM FROM TB_BOX_IVT_IR_B_BSIN_M irbsin LEFT JOIN TB_BOX_IVT_ENPR_INFO_D enprInfo ON irbsin.UTLINSTT_ID = enprInfo.UTLINSTT_ID LEFT JOIN TB_BOX_IVT_EXNT_RQST_M rqst ON irbsin.UTLINSTT_ID = rqst.RQST_ENPR_ID LEFT JOIN ( SELECT A.INVM_EXNT_RQST_ID , A.INVM_EXNT_PGSG_CD , A.RGSN_TS , C.COM_CD_NM AS INVM_EXNT_PGSG_NM FROM TB_BOX_IVT_EXNT_PGSG_R A INNER JOIN ( SELECT INVM_EXNT_RQST_ID , MAX(RGSN_TS) AS END_TS FROM TB_BOX_IVT_EXNT_PGSG_R GROUP BY INVM_EXNT_RQST_ID ) B ON A.INVM_EXNT_RQST_ID = B.INVM_EXNT_RQST_ID AND A.RGSN_TS = B.END_TS LEFT JOIN TB_BOX_IVT_COM_CD_D C ON A.INVM_EXNT_PGSG_CD = C.COM_CD_ID ) tbias_end ON tbias_end.INVM_EXNT_RQST_ID = rqst.INVM_EXNT_RQST_ID AND tbias_end.INVM_EXNT_PGSG_CD IN ('EXN00000', 'EXN00001' , 'EXN00002' , 'EXN00003') LEFT JOIN ( SELECT hoped.UTLINSTT_ID , hoped.INVM_STG_CD , hoped.RGSN_TS , C.COM_CD_NM AS INVM_HOPE_STG_NM , CC.COM_CD_NM AS INVM_HOPE_AMT_NM FROM TB_BOX_IVT_INVM_HOPE_D hoped INNER JOIN ( SELECT UTLINSTT_ID , MAX(RGSN_TS) AS END_TS FROM TB_BOX_IVT_INVM_HOPE_D GROUP BY UTLINSTT_ID ) B ON hoped.UTLINSTT_ID = B.UTLINSTT_ID AND hoped.RGSN_TS = B.END_TS LEFT JOIN TB_BOX_IVT_COM_CD_D C ON hoped.INVM_STG_CD = C.COM_CD_ID LEFT JOIN TB_BOX_IVT_COM_CD_D CC ON hoped.INVM_AMT_CD = CC.COM_CD_ID ) hope ON hope.UTLINSTT_ID = irbsin.UTLINSTT_ID WHERE 1=1 AND rqst.INVM_EXNT_RQST_ID = #{invmExntRqstId}

SELECT bass.UTLINSTT_ID, bass.INVT_DTLS_INVT_DE, bass.INVT_DTLS_INVT_INSTT, bass.INVT_DTLS_INVT_KND, bass.INVT_DTLS_ETVL_AMT, bass.INVT_DTLS_INVT_AMOUNT, rqst.INVT_DTLS_INVT_PNTTM_NM as INVT_DTLS_INVT_PNTTM FROM TB_BOX_IVT_VNENTRLON_REQST_BASS_M bass LEFT JOIN ( SELECT reqst.VNENTRLON_ID , reqst.INVT_DTLS_INVT_PNTTM , reqst.RGSN_TS , C.COM_CD_NM AS INVT_DTLS_INVT_PNTTM_NM FROM TB_BOX_IVT_VNENTRLON_REQST_BASS_M reqst INNER JOIN ( SELECT VNENTRLON_ID , MAX(RGSN_TS) AS END_TS FROM TB_BOX_IVT_VNENTRLON_REQST_BASS_M GROUP BY VNENTRLON_ID ) B ON reqst.VNENTRLON_ID = B.VNENTRLON_ID AND reqst.RGSN_TS = B.END_TS LEFT JOIN TB_BOX_IVT_COM_CD_D C ON reqst.INVT_DTLS_INVT_PNTTM = C.COM_CD_ID ) rqst ON rqst.VNENTRLON_ID = bass.VNENTRLON_ID WHERE UTLINSTT_ID = #{utlinsttId} ORDER BY INVT_DTLS_INVT_DE DESC
